g.text: DRAM Row Buffer Access Patterns: Performance & Coalescing

g.title: sizeof=8GB per Rank, 8-16 Banks per Rank

ol.li: Adjacent Access: Ensure threads in a warp access adjacent 4-byte words.
Alignment: Base address of memory transactions should be aligned to 128 bytes.
Layout: Prefer Structure of Arrays (SoA) over Arrays of Structures (AoS).
Shared Memory: If strided access is unavoidable, stage data in L1/Shared Memory first.

div.p: Thread: [0] [1] [2] [3] Address: [A] [I] [Q] [Y] R0 R1 R2 R3 └──── DIFFERENT ROWS ────┘

g.title: sizeof=8GB per Rank, 8-16 Banks per Rank
